name: Arcana Mirror Deck
constraints: No letters, numbers, or roman numerals in the artwork
Do not copy Rider-Waite-Smith or commercial tarot decks

alt.en: Arcana Mirror black and antique-gold card back with an oval mirror and celestial engraving.
alt.zh: Arcana Mirror 黑金牌背，中央为椭圆镜面与星图雕版纹样。

cardBack.promptFocus: Symmetric black-and-antique-gold card back with oval mirror, celestial compass lines, lunar phases, and worn paper grain.

alt.en: The Fool as a young wanderer approaching a mirror-like dawn across a broken stone causeway.
alt.zh: 愚者是一位走向镜面晨光的旅人，脚下是断裂的黑石长路。

the-fool.promptFocus: Threshold, trust, beginning, mirror-like dawn, broken black stone causeway.

alt.en: The Magician as a focused ritual artisan arranging elemental tools at a dark worktable.
alt.zh: 魔术师是一位专注的仪式工匠，在暗色桌面上排列四种元素工具。

the-magician.promptFocus: Agency, skill, focus, ritual artisan, elemental tools, dark worktable.

alt.en: The High Priestess in a moonlit sanctuary with plain pillars, a closed book, and an obsidian mirror-pool.
alt.zh: 女祭司立于月光圣所，身侧是素净石柱，怀中抱着闭合的书，前方有黑曜石镜池。

the-high-priestess.promptFocus: Intuition, silence, moonlit sanctuary, closed blank book, obsidian mirror-pool.

alt.en: The Empress as a sovereign garden-maker seated in a moonlit conservatory beside a dark mirror basin.
alt.zh: 皇后是一位坐在月光温室中的花园主宰，身旁有黑色镜盆与安静藤蔓。

the-empress.promptFocus: Nourishment, beauty, growth, moonlit conservatory, dark mirror basin, restrained vines.

alt.en: The Emperor as a stern architect-ruler beside a basalt drafting table and a small dark mirror disk.
alt.zh: 皇帝是一位冷静的建筑师君主，坐在玄武岩制图桌旁，身侧有小型黑镜圆盘。

the-emperor.promptFocus: Structure, authority, boundaries, basalt drafting table, dark mirror disk, disciplined geometry.

alt.en: The Hierophant as an elder ritual teacher in a candlelit archive with blank books and unmarked keys.
alt.zh: 教皇是一位烛光档案室中的年长仪式导师，周围有空白书册与无标记钥匙。

the-hierophant.promptFocus: Tradition, learning, shared values, candlelit archive, blank books, unmarked keys.

alt.en: The Lovers as two figures almost touching over a narrow mirror-pool in a dark walled garden.
alt.zh: 恋人是暗色围墙花园中隔着窄镜池几乎相触的两个人。

the-lovers.promptFocus: Choice, alignment, relationship, two figures, narrow mirror-pool, eclipse-like gold ring.

alt.en: The Chariot as a poised traveler guiding opposing stone-horse silhouettes across a wet obsidian causeway.
alt.zh: 战车是一位沉着旅者驾驭相对的石马剪影，穿过湿润的黑曜石长路。

the-chariot.promptFocus: Direction, discipline, momentum, ceremonial chariot, opposing stone horses, obsidian causeway.

alt.en: Strength as a calm figure touching a resting shadow-lion beside a small oval mirror.
alt.zh: 力量是一位平静人物轻触休憩的影狮，身旁有一面小椭圆镜。

strength.promptFocus: Courage, patience, soft power, resting lion, gentle touch, oval mirror.

alt.en: The Hermit as a solitary hooded seeker holding a lantern on a black-stone mountain ridge.
alt.zh: 隐士是一位披着斗篷的独行求索者，在黑石山脊上举着灯。

the-hermit.promptFocus: Solitude, discernment, guidance, hooded seeker, lantern, black-stone ridge.

alt.en: Wheel of Fortune as a great antique orrery-wheel turned by several hands above a black mirror pool.
alt.zh: 命运之轮是一座巨大的古董天体仪轮，由数只手在黑色镜池上方转动。

wheel-of-fortune.promptFocus: Change, cycles, timing, antique orrery-wheel, turning hands, black mirror pool.

alt.en: Justice as a composed figure holding balanced scales and a narrow mirror-bright blade before dark mirrors.
alt.zh: 正义是一位沉着人物，在暗镜前持着天平和细长明亮的镜刃。

justice.promptFocus: Truth, accountability, balance, scales, mirror-bright blade, dark mirror panels.

alt.en: The Hanged Man as a serene inverted figure suspended from a crescent stone arch above a mirror pool.
alt.zh: 倒吊人是一位安宁倒悬的人物，悬在新月形石拱与镜池上方。

the-hanged-man.promptFocus: Pause, surrender, new perspective, inverted figure, crescent stone arch, mirror pool.

alt.en: Death as a quiet cloaked rider moving through a winter garden toward a black mirror gate.
alt.zh: 死神是一位静默披篷骑者，穿过冬日花园走向黑色镜门。

death.promptFocus: Ending, release, transformation, cloaked rider, winter garden, black mirror gate.

alt.en: Temperance as a composed alchemist pouring liquid between plain vessels beside a black mirror-pool.
alt.zh: 节制是一位沉着炼金者，在黑色镜池旁于两个素净容器之间倾倒液体。

temperance.promptFocus: Integration, moderation, healing, alchemist, two unmarked vessels, black mirror-pool.

alt.en: The Devil as a refined horned shadow figure in an underground mirror chamber with loose velvet ribbons.
alt.zh: 恶魔是一位精致的角形阴影人物，位于地下镜室中，前方有松散丝绒带。

the-devil.promptFocus: Attachment, compulsion, shadow, horned shadow figure, obsidian mirror table, loose ribbons.

alt.en: The Tower as an obsidian observatory cracked by white-gold lightning above storm-dark water.
alt.zh: 高塔是一座被白金闪电劈裂的黑曜石观测塔，立于风暴般的暗水之上。

the-tower.promptFocus: Disruption, truth, collapse, obsidian observatory, white-gold lightning, mirror shards.

alt.en: The Star as a solitary stargazer beside a black mirror-lake under a guiding star.
alt.zh: 星星是一位黑色镜湖旁的独行观星者，头顶有一颗指引之星。

the-star.promptFocus: Hope, renewal, guidance, stargazer, black mirror-lake, guiding star.

alt.en: The Moon as a misty black-stone path between mirror pools under a large crescent moon.
alt.zh: 月亮是一条雾中的黑石小径，穿过两片镜池，头顶有巨大的新月。

the-moon.promptFocus: Uncertainty, dreams, projection, crescent moon, mirror pools, misty black-stone path.

alt.en: The Sun as a radiant disk reflected in a mirror fountain while a young figure opens a dark cloak.
alt.zh: 太阳是一轮映在镜泉中的明亮日盘，一位年轻人物向光展开暗色披风。

the-sun.promptFocus: Clarity, vitality, joy, radiant sun disk, mirror fountain, opening dark cloak.

alt.en: Judgement as quiet figures rising from a dark mirror-lake beneath a bronze bell and dawn light.
alt.zh: 审判是几位安静人物从黑色镜湖中醒来，上方悬着青铜钟与黎明光。

judgement.promptFocus: Calling, review, awakening, figures rising, bronze bell, dark mirror-lake.

alt.en: The World as a graceful figure standing inside an oval mirror-ring with vines, stars, and elemental emblems.
alt.zh: 世界是一位优雅人物站在椭圆镜环中，周围有藤蔓、星辰与元素象征。

the-world.promptFocus: Completion, integration, belonging, oval mirror-ring, vines, stars, elemental emblems.
